name: Bonterra Resources Inc.
summary: Bonterra Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in Canada. It explores primarily for gold and silver deposits. The Company's primary projects include the Gladiator, Moroy, and Barry deposits, as well as the Bachelor Mill. Bonterra Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Val-d'Or, Canada.
